name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve nvy
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run command '...'
2. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 22.04]
- nvy version: [run `nvy --version`]
- Shell: [e.g., bash, zsh, fish]
- Runtime affected: [e.g., go, node]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as:

- Contents of `.go-version` or similar version files
- Output of `echo $PATH`
- Full error messages or stack traces
